alternatives_considered: Wait for more features before first release
Release only source install without binaries
content.context: README referenced GitHub Releases for binary downloads but no release existed. The CLI was stable with all MVP commands implemented (init, update, read, write, query, delete, profiles, status, doctor, export, import). Created the release to match documentation and enable non-Go users to install.
content.decision: Released v0.2.0 as the first public MVP with cross-compiled binaries for 4 platforms (darwin-arm64, darwin-amd64, linux-arm64, linux-amd64) via GitHub Releases.
impact: Users can install L.E.O. without Go toolchain
Version is embedded in binary via ldflags at build time
Makefile build-all target produces all 4 binaries
